title: Help with Auto-link by Xebia
excerpt:
Anyone out there experienced in using Auto Link app developed by Xebia? 
It looks very promising, but I dunno what I might be getting wrong and it isn’t running.

posts.author: juan.pyco (Juan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Anyone out there experienced in using Auto Link app developed by Xebia?

It looks very promising, but I dunno what I might be getting wrong and it isn’t running.

posts.author: Fantasy-Media-Team (Fantasy Media Team)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @juan.pyco

We’ve developed an app called Connected Boards Automations. Which allows to run robust automations on connected boards column, it can also automatically connect items like auto link →

Screenshot 2024-07-31 at 10.56.042200×554 30.3 KB

Also worth adding that it also supports -

  1. Automatically connecting items based on conditions and flexible logic.
  2. Automatically removing connecting.
  3. Syncing values between connected items.
  4. Cross-board automations (trigger in the connected board and action in the current board)

You can find it in the monday.com app marketplace in the platform or here - Connected Boards Automations - monday.com App Marketplace

Hope that helps!

posts.author: AnishJ (Anish)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey can you explain what’s not working? Curious I am making a new app so it might be useful for me.
